layout.spacing_system: Generous Spacing: use p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32.
layout.grid_strategy: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetric, breathable) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 for complex layouts. Standard bento grid for services.
layout.section_rules: Generous vertical padding between sections (py-24 or py-32). Mobile-first approach.

components.hero: Full-screen (min-h-screen). Parallax background image. Max overlay opacity bg-black/40 to let luxury image breathe. Animated stats at bottom using Framer Motion.
components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70), subtle bottom border (border-white/20). Scroll-aware.
components.buttons: Premium feel. Primary CTA uses #7C3AED (Royal Purple) with a soft shadow and scale-up on hover. Accent CTA uses #F59E0B (Golden).
components.cards: Subtle shadows (shadow-lg), slight hover lift (-translate-y-1), and border-white/40. No heavy borders.
components.gallery: Masonry layout with category filter. Images MUST have object-cover and proper aspect ratios. Lightbox on click.
components.pricing: 3 cards. Gold/Premium highlighted. Use #F59E0B for highlighted package accents.
components.process: 4-step vertical or alternating timeline. Use react-icons for steps.
components.contact_form: Frontend-only. Use clean input fields with bottom border only or subtle background.
components.footer: Dark background (#111827) with light text for contrast shift. Massive space (py-20).
components.animations: Framer Motion. Smooth scroll (Lenis if possible, but keep to Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveal). Staggered entrances for cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, react-icons, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Update index.css to import Google Fonts: Playfair Display and Poppins.
Build the complete responsive layout in React.js using Tailwind CSS.
Adhere strictly to the color palette provided (Primary: #7C3AED, Secondary: #EC4899, Accent: #F59E0B).
Use standard HTML tags + Tailwind for marketing layouts, avoiding standard Shadcn layout wrappers for creativity.
Implement scroll animations with Framer Motion.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
DO NOT use placeholder images. Rely on the provided 'image_urls' mapping.
Ensure all components are '.js' or '.jsx'. Do not use '.tsx'.
